365 J3H J3H_TISSUE_PAIN (J3H) Soft Tissue Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - soft tissue pain (lesion, muscle) in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
366 J3I J3I_STOMACH_PAIN (J3I) Stomach Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - stomach pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
367 J3J J3J_OTHER (J3J) Other Pain Site CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - other in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
